title: Right Click Ladder
description: Place ladders up or down by clicking on the ladder in front of you.
body:
🪜 Right Click Ladder

 

**Minecraft Mod for NeoForge – Version 1.21.1** Created by **Holysweet** ***

📦 What It Does

 

Right Click Ladder adds a simple but powerful quality-of-life feature: > 🪜 **Right-click an existing ladder block while holding a ladder to place another one — above or below, depending on your input.** * **Normal right-click** → builds **upward** * **Sneak-right-click** → builds **downward** * Click the **same ladder repeatedly** to build long vertical chains * Supports **air placement** — ladders don’t need to touch walls * Works in **Survival and Creative** ***

🎮 How to Use

 

1. Place a ladder block on any surface. 2. Hold ladders in your hand. 3. Look at the existing ladder and: * Right-click normally to extend **up** * Sneak + right-click to extend **down** 4. Click the same ladder again to keep building — no need to move! ***

🛠️ Requirements

 

* Minecraft **1.21.1** * **NeoForge** (make sure your loader matches!) ***

📜 Modpack Permissions

 

✅ **You are free to use this mod in any public or private modpack.** 💬 **I kindly ask that you credit me (`Holysweet`) somewhere in your modlist or description.** It helps others discover the mod and gives proper love to small projects 💜 ***

💡 Future Plans

 

This was my very first Minecraft mod — and it's just the beginning. More utility mods (and magic… maybe 👀) may follow under the name **Lumen**. *** Thank you for trying Right Click Ladder! 🪜 [My first Feature video (it’s near the end :))](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mKkwQfjFNJw)
